description.value:
Cost: 1 Effect: Equip or remove a shield. Drawing/stowing a shield requires focused effort and cannot be done as part of a [Move] action. The shield must be readily accessible (on your back, at your side, etc.)

Interact Actions

Interact actions involve manipulating objects, the environment, or simple physical tasks that don't require specialized skills. Many Interact actions can be combined with movement for efficiency.

system.effect:
